prompt: Create an original Japanese itasha vehicle based entirely on the uploaded illustration. Design a fully fictional car and manufacturer naturally born from the artwork’s universe, never resembling real vehicles or brands. The design must adapt to the illustration itself: cute rounded styling for soft fantasy or shrine themes, elegant luxury styling for regal worlds, aggressive mechanical styling for cyberpunk or military themes, sporty styling for energetic characters, mystical styling for magical worlds, or retro-futuristic styling for nostalgic sci-fi. Body shape, proportions, cockpit, wheels, headlights, aero parts, glowing elements, materials, and interior must visually match the illustration’s atmosphere, colors, fashion, architecture, magic, and technology. All decals, logos, symbols, typography, crests, and sponsor-style graphics must be fully original fictional designs inspired only by the illustration. If a character exists, place them naturally beside the vehicle. Cinematic automotive photography, anime-inspired photorealism, masterpiece quality.
